property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\RedHat\Podman\;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;%JAVA_HOME%\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\ProgramData\matia\gitkraken\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\matia\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code Insiders\bin;C:\Users\matia\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;;.

testcase.name: testParallel
